summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new Trust Seals section on Seymour Law homepage. All features working perfectly including prominent U.S. Embassy Nassau seal, 5 additional affiliations grid, hover effects, and responsive design across desktop, tablet, and mobile.
passed_tests: Trust Seals section displays with 'Trusted & Recognized' header and 'Official Affiliations & Accreditations' title
Featured U.S. Embassy Nassau seal with prominent navy background and gold accents
U.S. Embassy 'Recommended Attorney' badge displays prominently in featured seal
U.S. Embassy description mentions 'official roster' and 'American citizens' as required
Verified badge displays correctly in featured seal area with checkmark icon

Grid of exactly 5 additional affiliations displays correctly: Bahamas Bar Association, Caribbean Association of Banks, International Bar Association, Bahamas Real Estate Association, Caribbean Law Institute
Each affiliation card shows proper components: icon (SVG), name, subtitle in gold text, and year information with 'Since' prefix
Hover effects work on affiliation cards - border color changes from gray to gold on hover
Trust statement paragraph displays at bottom: 'Our affiliations and accreditations reflect three decades...'
Section integrates properly between Why Us and Testimonials sections in correct order
Animations trigger on scroll with 69 style-based animation elements detected
Mobile responsive design works perfectly - featured seal adapts to narrow width, cards stack vertically
Tablet responsive layout displays cards in proper grid formation
Section maintains consistent navy/gold color scheme matching overall site design
All data-testid attributes present for automated testing: trust-seals-section, trust-seal-featured, trust-seal-{id}
Framer Motion animations integrated smoothly with scroll-triggered effects
